mapper.select: SELECT tool_code, tool_name, description FROM tools ORDER BY tool_code
SELECT d.tool_code, d.tool_name, d.description FROM group_tool_mapping m JOIN tools d ON d.tool_code = m.tool_code WHERE m.group_id = #{groupId} AND m.is_enabled = TRUE ORDER BY d.tool_code

SELECT tool_code FROM tools WHERE tool_code IN
#{toolCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO tools (tool_code, tool_name, description) VALUES (#{tool.toolCode}, #{tool.toolName}, #{tool.description})
INSERT INTO group_tool_mapping (group_id, tool_code, is_enabled) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{toolCode}, #{isEnabled}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_enabled = VALUES(is_enabled)
INSERT IGNORE INTO group_tool_mapping (group_id, tool_code, is_enabled) SELECT #{groupId}, t.tool_code, TRUE FROM tools t
INSERT IGNORE INTO group_tool_mapping (group_id, tool_code, is_enabled) SELECT g.group_id, t.tool_code, TRUE FROM `group` g CROSS JOIN tools t
